Package index

All functions

grz_align()
Align/interpolate to a regular interval
grz_append_paddock_names()
Append paddock names by point-in-polygon intersection
grz_behavior_pipeline()
Behavior interpretation pipeline
grz_behavior_threshold_guide()
Build threshold guidance summaries for behavior classification
grz_calculate_epoch_metrics()
Calculate merged epoch metrics
grz_calculate_movement()
Calculate row-level movement metrics
grz_calculate_social()
Calculate row-level social metrics
grz_calculate_spatial()
Calculate spatial/home-range metrics by epoch
grz_classify_activity_gmm()
Classify Active/Inactive States Using GMM
grz_classify_behavior()
Classify behavior states from movement metrics
grz_clean()
Cleaning pipeline wrapper
grz_clean_duplicates()
Drop duplicate rows
grz_clean_errors()
Clean row-level data errors
grz_clean_spatial()
Spatial cleaning using paddock polygons
grz_clean_speed_fixed()
Clean speed outliers using fixed threshold
grz_clean_speed_stat()
Clean speed outliers using data-driven threshold
grz_denoise()
Denoise GPS jitter using statistical or state-aware smoothing
grz_downsample()
Downsample to lower frequency
grz_label_gps_states()
Label GPS States in an Interactive Leaflet Timeline App
grz_map()
Plot Cattle GPS Fixes on an Interactive Leaflet Map
grz_plot_diurnal_metrics()
Plot diurnal heatmaps for key movement metrics
grz_plot_diurnal_states()
Plot diurnal state proportions
grz_summarise_movement()
Summarise row-level movement metrics by epoch
grz_summarise_social()
Summarise row-level social metrics by epoch
grz_tune_thresholds()
Tune idle/graze thresholds with clearer diagnostics
grz_validate()
Validate GPS schema compliance
grz_validate_behavior()
Validate behavior-state assignments
grz_validate_gps()
Validate canonical GPS data
